title: Bounded Prefetch, Worker Ownership, Ordering, and Backpressure · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A regional field-research team incrementally builds bounded cancellable Pokemon prefetch pipeline from original fixed PokéAPI fixtures while retaining prior Go, HTTP, Git, quality-gate, accessibility, security, testing, cancellation, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of bounded cancellable Pokemon prefetch pipeline while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Define which next-view latency benefit justifies prefetch traffic and when no prefetch should occur.
Set worker, queue, request, byte, and time ceilings from fair-use and resource evidence rather than input size.
Assign which goroutine creates, sends, closes, drains, cancels, and waits for each channel and result.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pokedex Go Prefetch Value
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go team handles case 6599 during a disconnected community-lab recovery drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce prefetch concurrency, queue, ordering, cancellation, and partial-failure ownership; all goroutines, bodies, signals, timers, and files require named cleanup ownership; then change one resource identity, pagination link, JSON field, status, or body budget and revalidate admission. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define which next-view latency benefit justifies prefetch traffic and when no prefetch should occur.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pokedex Go Prefetch Value.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define which next-view latency benefit justifies prefetch traffic and when no prefetch should occur. For Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pokedex Go Prefetch Value, keep Pokedex Go Prefetch Value connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
